context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Kyiv. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Good day! What is troubling you?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever
acceptedResponses: у мене болить голова і температура
у мене головний біль і температура
мене турбує головний біль і температура
exchanges.hint: у мене болить голова і температура

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: How long have you been sick?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Зрозуміло. Чи є ще якісь симптоми? Кашель, нежить?
exchanges.translation: I see. Are there any other symptoms? Cough, runny nose?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Я випишу вам ліки. Приймайте їх тричі на день після їжі.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe medicine for you. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Так, прийдіть через тиждень. Якщо стане гірше, телефонуйте одразу.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If it gets worse, call immediately.
